# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: AI-assisted DSA practice meets cyberpunk Code Breach
- Summary: Showcase CodeGrind's AI-assisted problem solving, real-time editor, and the Code Breach cyberpunk redesign with a focus on learning throughput and customization.
- Slug: codegrind-engagement-dsai-support-and-code-breach-redesign
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-engagement-dsai-support-and-code-breach-redesign

- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style challenges with an Azure OpenAI assistant, real-time code execution, and a cyberpunk Code Breach visual layer to visualize programming concepts as interactive towers.
- CTA: Try a guided DSA challenge with AI help now and explore the Code Breach tower defenses in-action.
- Visual brief: Short demonstration video: 1) split screen of problem prompt, 2) live coding with syntax highlighting, 3) AI assistant guidance pane, 4) gameplay view showing Code Breach towers visualizing a problem solution, 5) quick UI tour of new features and sign-in flow

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
